        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1980 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1990 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}


















arm_grant_naval_carriers_the_new_order = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1960 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1970 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1980 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1990 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

























arm_grant_naval_destroyers_the_new_order = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = modern_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = even_more_modern_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = even_more_modern_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_modern_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = super_modern_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}







arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_the_new_order = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_the_new_order = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = landing_craft }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = improved_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_transport }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = degaussing }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = degaussing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1964 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1964 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1964
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1966 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1966 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1966
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1968 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1968 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1968
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = advanced_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = modern_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = landing_ship_dock }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = landing_ship_dock
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}





















arm_grant_naval_submarines_the_new_order = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1960 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1970 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1980 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1990 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
